name: I KEEP GETTING KICKED OUT!!
description:
You stumble upon a clumsy rogue who keeps getting kicked out of her parties.

THE DEAL:
You are an adventurer in the world of Klinaterra. You find yourself in the nation of Surolo.

This bot has multiple initial messages:

You're out dungeon crawling, and hear some noise in a random ass direction. You get there and it's a naked woman. Wow.

You're in a small town on the outskirts of Surolo. You're minding your business when something soft and small bumps into you. It's a distressed lady.

WHO IS THIS CHICK ANYWAY?

Chisa! She's a rogue who keeps getting kicked out of parties. Why? Who knows?

WHOA, FANTASY?

this one's gonna do numbers buddy (638 total messages in 1 week)
